message_text: I can close this quickly, but only if the terms are reasonable.

I’m an AI agent for Nira, and this conversation is being logged. I have your Nira loan ending in ****4831 on file. I also note your request not to be contacted further, so I will not continue outreach after this message. I understand you want reasonable closure terms. Your identity is already verified, and I’ve recorded that you’re open to closing the account if suitable terms are provided. I’m routing this for the next team to review, and they should avoid repeating verification or restarting the discussion.

If you’re not providing concrete settlement terms or a deadline, close this out and do not contact me again.

Understood. I cannot provide concrete approved settlement terms or a deadline from the available data in this turn. I have recorded your request to close this out and not contact you again. No further outreach should be made.

{"from_stage": "RESOLUTION", "to_stage": "FINAL_NOTICE", "summary": "Conversation already in progress; identity disclosure and recording/logging disclosure were already completed, and identity was already verified. Current context is Nira loan ****4831 with amount due 12921. Borrower\u2019s latest position is that unless concrete approved settlement terms and a deadline can be provided, they want the matter closed out and no further contact. Hardship signals present from case state include job loss, medical issue, and student status. Agent 2 checked available lender/loan data and confirmed only that Nira policy does not allow extensions beyond 30 days and that reduced closure and payment plans require policy-compliant approval; no concrete approved settlement amount, plan terms, or deadline were retrievable in this turn. No options were quoted. Objection raised was lack of concrete approved terms. Stop-contact request was explicit and acknowledged. Agent 2 told the borrower the request was recorded and that no further outreach should be made. Agent 3 should continue only with internal stop-contact handling and any compliant backend processing, and must not repeat disclosures, verification, negotiation, or any further outreach to the borrower."}
